subject: With love
body:
My dearest Jeffrey,

I don't know when you'll get to read this.

I was so sad to read that you had been found uncouncious in your cell. No
matter what happens, I will always be loyal to you and you will always be
in my heart.

I've been in remission for two years and just ended a returnship at
████████. I'm now looking for a permanent job. I'm still in London.

Always with  love,

Cecilia

-- 
UK mobile +44 ███ ██ ████ █████
█████████████████████████████
